data.title: BWX Technologies to reveal Q3 2025 results on Nov 3 after market close, followed by conference call at 5 pm EST.
data.description: BWX Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: BWXT) is set to announce its third-quarter 2025 results on November 3, 2025, after the market closes. A conference call is scheduled for 5:00 p.m. EST on the same day. For those interested, a listen-only option is available online at investors.bwxt.com to view the accompanying presentation. Participants can join the call at (U.S.) 1-800-715-9871 or (International) 1-646-307-1963, using the conference ID: 2465821. A replay of the conference will also be available.

data.title: Neptune Insurance Holdings Inc. fully exercised the underwriters' option to purchase additional shares, closing their IPO of 18,421,053 Class A common stock.
data.description: Neptune Insurance Holdings Inc., based in St. Petersburg, Florida, disclosed on October 2, 2025, that it, along with its subsidiary Neptune Flood Incorporated, has launched its initial public offering. The company plans to sell 18,421,053 shares of its Class A common stock as part of this offering.

data.title: AZZ Inc. in Fort Worth, TX declares $0.20 per share cash dividend for second quarter of Fiscal Year 2026.
data.description: In Fort Worth, Texas on October 2, 2025, AZZ Inc., a prominent company specializing in hot-dip galvanizing and coil coating solutions, revealed that its Board of Directors has given the green light for a cash dividend for the second quarter. The dividend is set at $0.20 per share on the Company's stock with the ticker symbol NYSE: AZZ.

data.title: Grand Canyon Education, Inc. (Nasdaq: LOPE) to release Q3 2025 earnings on Nov 5 and hold conference call at 2:30 P.M.
data.description: In Phoenix on October 2, 2025, Grand Canyon Education, Inc. (Nasdaq:LOPE) revealed plans to release its 2025 third quarter financial results after the market closes on Wednesday, November 5, 2025. A conference call to delve deeper into the results is scheduled at 2:30 P.M.

data.title: Explore Fairbanks releases 32-page Winter Guide for 2025-26 season, essential for visitors embracing Fairbanks winter.
data.description: Fairbanks, Alaska - On October 2, 2025, Explore Fairbanks unveiled the 2025-26 Fairbanks Winter Guide, a comprehensive 32-page booklet in full color, designed to assist visitors in making the most of the winter season in Fairbanks. This guide provides essential information, tips, and suggestions for activities and attractions in the area.

data.title: Nabors Industries Ltd. (NYSE: NBR) invites to 3rd Quarter 2025 earnings conference call on Oct. 29, 2025 at 10:00 a.m.
data.description: Nabors Industries Ltd., a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol NBR, headquartered in Hamilton, Bermuda, has scheduled a virtual event on October 29, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. Central Time. The event will feature Anthony G. Petrello, who serves as the Chairman, President, and Chief Executive Officer of the company, along with Miguel Rodriguez, the Chief Financial Officer. Investors and stakeholders are invited to join this event to gain insights and updates on the company's performance and future plans.

data.title: Select Medical Holdings Corporation to announce Q3 2025 results on Oct 30, after market close. Stock ticker: SEM.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, in Mechanicsburg, Pennsylvania, Select Medical Holdings Corporation ("Select Medical") (NYSE: SEM) announced that it will disclose its financial performance for the third quarter of 2025, ending on September 30, on Thursday, October 30, 2025, post-market hours. Following the release, Select Medical will conduct a...

data.title: Impinj will reveal Q3 2025 financial results soon.
data.description: A new study reveals that over 1,000 people in the country are currently infected with a rare virus, with 50 new cases reported in the past week alone. The virus, which has a mortality rate of 10%, has already claimed the lives of 100 individuals. Health officials are urging the public to take precautions to prevent the spread of the virus, such as practicing good hygiene and avoiding close contact with those who are sick. Additionally, efforts are being made to develop a vaccine to combat the virus and prevent further spread.

data.title: CACI to report Q1 FY2026 results on Oct 22, with a conference call on Oct 23 at 8:00 AM ET for discussion.
data.description: RESTON, Virginia - CACI International Inc (NYSE: CACI) is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026 on October 22 after the market closes. A conference call will be held on October 23 at 8:00 a.m. Eastern time, where CACI’s top executives will delve into the quarterly results and engage in a Q&A session. Interested parties can access the call and related materials on CACI’s Investor Relations website. Additionally, a replay of the conference call will be available for review.

data.title: SPOZZ, a community-owned music platform, introduces "BEATS" for direct creator-to-creator music licensing and sales.
data.description: Today in Miami, SPOZZ, a rapidly expanding community-operated music and streaming platform, revealed the launch of BEATS, an innovative feature enabling artists to sell and license their original music directly to fellow creators through a new standardized system. This move marks a significant development for the platform, which has been gaining traction recently.

data.title: Florida Southern College appoints Dr. Martha Placeres as the Wilhelmina MacDonald Endowed Chair in Music.
data.description: In Lakeland, Florida on October 2, 2025, Florida Southern College shared news that Dr. Martha Placeres will be taking on the role of the Wilhelmina MacDonald Endowed Faculty Chair in Music. Dr. Placeres, who has been with the college since 2019, will now be leading in this prestigious position.

data.title: Money market fund assets hit record high of $7.37 trillion, with $50.55 billion increase in a week - ICI report.
data.description: On October 1, 2025, the Investment Company Institute disclosed that the total assets of money market funds surged by $50.55 billion to reach $7.37 trillion. Government funds within taxable money market funds witnessed a notable growth of $54.64 billion during the same period.

data.title: Compass Diversified declares Q3 2025 distributions on Series A, B, and C preferred shares. Board approves quarterly cash distribution.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, Compass Diversified (NYSE: CODI), a company possessing prominent middle market businesses, revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash distribution for all three of its preferred share series.

data.title: Sunrise secures $29M contract for 10,000 tons of artificial graphite anode materials with China Sodium Times.
data.description: Sunrise New Energy Co., Ltd. (NASDAQ: EPOW) based in Dover, USA, revealed that its subsidiary, Sunrise (Guizhou) New Energy Materials Co., Ltd., has signed a notable one-year supply agreement with China Sodium Times (Shenzhen) New Energy Technology Co., Ltd., a prominent lithium battery pack manufacturer. This contract marks a significant partnership between the two companies and underscores Sunrise's commitment to the new energy sector. The deal is poised to enhance production and distribution, with both companies poised to benefit from this collaboration.

data.title: Hasbro will announce its third quarter 2025 earnings on October 23, 2025. Conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET. Stock Symbol: $HAS.
data.description: Hasbro, Inc. revealed that they will disclose their third quarter financial results on Thursday, October 23, 2025, prior to the market opening. The company, trading as NASDAQ: HAS, will be hosting a webcast of their earnings conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. Specific financial and statistical details, including information mandated by Regulation G, will be accessible on Hasbro's Investor Relations website during the webcast.
Johnson meets Trump - reports

data.title: Rumble and Perplexity form a strategic partnership, joining forces to enhance operations.
data.description: According to recent reports, the economy is projected to grow by an estimated 4% in the next fiscal year. Unemployment rates have risen to 6.5%, with approximately 1.8 million people currently out of work. Inflation also saw an increase, reaching 2.3% in the last quarter. The government is planning to invest $500 million in infrastructure projects to stimulate economic growth. Additionally, the stock market experienced a 10% decrease this week, causing concern among investors. Experts are advising caution in the current financial market.

data.title: TEN Ltd. declares $0.59375 quarterly dividend for Series F Preferred Shares. Board of Directors announcement.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, a prominent crude, product, and LNG tanker operator, TEN Ltd. (“TEN”), based in Athens, Greece, revealed that its Board of Directors has sanctioned the usual quarterly cash dividend of about $0.59375 per share for its Series F Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Shares, traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol TENPRF.

data.title: PDF Solutions partners with Lavorro for Generative AI to speed up semiconductor fab documentation access.
data.description: In Santa Clara, California on October 2, 2025, PDF Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: PDFS), a prominent data solutions provider for the semiconductor and electronics industries, disclosed a collaboration with Lavorro Inc., a frontrunner in Generative AI for semiconductor manufacturing. This partnership aims to grant shared customers the ability to retrieve up-to-date engineering documentation from the semiconductor fab they oversee. The end goal is to facilitate swifter and more efficient execution of tasks and control of manufacturing equipment.
